name: LEGACY_DO_NOT_DEPLOY_HR Portal（舊版帶登入）
description: Legacy static n8n portal retained for reference only. Production uses the Node.js dashboard server plus live_Dashboard_API.json.

parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'today', TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
  'generatedAt', TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS'),

  'schedEvents', COALESCE((
    SELECT json_agg(e ORDER BY (e->>'date'))
    FROM (
      SELECT json_build_object(
        'type', 'interview',
        'name', c.name,
        'pos', c.applied_position,
        'dept', c.department,
        'date', TO_CHAR(i.interview_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
        'time', COALESCE(i.interview_time, ''),
        'hr', COALESCE(i.hr_owner, ''),
        'round', COALESCE(i.round, 1),
        'note', COALESCE(i.notes, ''),
        'emailLink', COALESCE(i.email_web_link, '')
      ) AS e
      FROM interviews i JOIN candidates c ON c.id = i.candidate_id
      WHERE i.interview_date IS NOT NULL
        AND i.interview_date >= CURRENT_DATE - 14
        AND i.interview_date <= CURRENT_DATE + 45
        AND COALESCE(i.status,'') NOT IN ('cancelled','取消面試')
      UNION ALL
      SELECT json_build_object(
        'type', 'onboard',
        'name', o.name, 'pos', o.position, 'dept', o.department,
        'date', TO_CHAR(o.expected_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
        'time', '09:00', 'hr', COALESCE(o.hr_owner,''), 'round', 0,
        'note', COALESCE(o.notes,''), 'emailLink', COALESCE(o.email_web_link,'')
      ) AS e
      FROM onboardings o
      WHERE o.expected_date IS NOT NULL AND o.status != 'cancelled'
        AND o.expected_date >= CURRENT_DATE - 7 AND o.expected_date <= CURRENT_DATE + 60
      UNION ALL
      SELECT json_build_object(
        'type', 'resign',
        'name', r.name, 'pos', r.position, 'dept', r.department,
        'date', TO_CHAR(r.last_day, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
        'time', '', 'hr', COALESCE(r.hr_owner,''), 'round', 0,
        'note', COALESCE(r.reason,''), 'emailLink', COALESCE(r.email_web_link,'')
      ) AS e
      FROM resignations r
      WHERE r.last_day IS NOT NULL AND r.status != 'cancelled'
        AND r.last_day >= CURRENT_DATE - 7 AND r.last_day <= CURRENT_DATE + 60
    ) ev
  ), '[]'::json),

  'onboardData', COALESCE((
    SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
      'name', o.name, 'dept', o.department, 'pos', o.position,
      'date', TO_CHAR(o.expected_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
      'hr', COALESCE(o.hr_owner,''),
      'status', CASE WHEN o.status='onboarded' THEN 'onboarded' ELSE 'pending' END,
      'emailLink', COALESCE(o.email_web_link,'')
    ) ORDER BY o.expected_date DESC)
    FROM onboardings o
    WHERE o.status != 'cancelled' AND o.expected_date >= CURRENT_DATE - 60
  ), '[]'::json),

  'resignData', COALESCE((
    SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
      'name', r.name, 'dept', r.department, 'pos', r.position,
      'lastDay', TO_CHAR(r.last_day, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
      'hr', COALESCE(r.hr_owner,''), 'reason', COALESCE(r.reason,''),
      'status', r.status, 'emailLink', COALESCE(r.email_web_link,'')
    ) ORDER BY r.last_day DESC)
    FROM resignations r
    WHERE r.status != 'cancelled' AND r.last_day >= CURRENT_DATE - 60
  ), '[]'::json),

  'candidatesData', COALESCE((
    SELECT json_agg(cd ORDER BY (cd->>'latestDate') DESC NULLS LAST)
    FROM (
      SELECT json_build_object(
        'name', c.name, 'pos', c.applied_position, 'dept', c.department,
        'date', TO_CHAR(MAX(i.interview_date), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
        'latestDate', TO_CHAR(MAX(i.interview_date), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
        'status', CASE
          WHEN c.status = 'hired' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM onboardings o WHERE o.candidate_id=c.id AND o.status='onboarded') THEN 'onboarded'
          WHEN c.status = 'hired' THEN 'offer'
          WHEN c.status IN ('rejected','withdrawn') THEN 'withdrawn'
          WHEN c.status LIKE '%錄取%' THEN 'offer'
          WHEN c.status LIKE '%到職%' THEN 'onboarded'
          ELSE 'interviewing'
        END,
        'onboard', (SELECT TO_CHAR(o.expected_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM onboardings o WHERE o.candidate_id=c.id LIMIT 1),
        'hr', COALESCE(MAX(i.hr_owner),''),
        'note', COALESCE(c.notes,''),
        'source', COALESCE(c.source,''),
        'emailLink', COALESCE(MAX(i.email_web_link),''),
        'history', COALESCE((
          SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
            'date', TO_CHAR(ih.interview_date,'YYYY-MM-DD'),
            'type', 'interview',
            'title', CONCAT('第', ih.round, '輪面試 — ', COALESCE(ih.status,'')),
            'note', COALESCE(ih.notes,''),
            'color', CASE ih.result WHEN 'passed' THEN 'green' WHEN 'failed' THEN 'pink' ELSE 'blue' END
          ) ORDER BY ih.interview_date)
          FROM interviews ih WHERE ih.candidate_id=c.id AND ih.interview_date IS NOT NULL
        ), '[]'::json)
      ) AS cd
      FROM candidates c
      LEFT JOIN interviews i ON i.candidate_id = c.id
      GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.applied_position, c.department, c.status, c.notes, c.source
    ) cands
  ), '[]'::json),

  'jobsData', '[]'::json,

  'monthlyTrend', COALESCE((
    SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
      'month', TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('month', i.interview_date), 'YYYY-MM'),
      'interviews', COUNT(*),
      'offers', COUNT(CASE WHEN c.status IN ('hired','錄取') THEN 1 END),
      'onboarded', COUNT(CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM onboardings o WHERE o.candidate_id=c.id AND o.status='onboarded') THEN 1 END)
    ) ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', i.interview_date))
    FROM (
      SELECT DISTINCT ON (DATE_TRUNC('month', i2.interview_date), i2.candidate_id)
        i2.interview_date, i2.candidate_id
      FROM interviews i2
      WHERE i2.interview_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 months'
    ) i
    JOIN candidates c ON c.id = i.candidate_id
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', i.interview_date)
    LIMIT 6
  ), '[]'::json),

  'stats', json_build_object(
    'activeCount', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM candidates WHERE status NOT IN ('hired','rejected','withdrawn','錄取','到職')),
    'offerCount', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM candidates WHERE status IN ('hired','錄取')),
    'pendingOnboard', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM onboardings WHERE status='pending' AND expected_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE+30),
    'pendingResign', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resignations WHERE status='active' AND last_day BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE+30),
    'monthOnboard', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM onboardings WHERE expected_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month',CURRENT_DATE) AND status='onboarded'),
    'monthResign', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resignations WHERE last_day >= DATE_TRUNC('month',CURRENT_DATE) AND status='done'),
    'hireRate', COALESCE((SELECT ROUND(100.0*COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.status IN ('hired','錄取') THEN c.id END)/NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT c.id),0),0) FROM candidates c JOIN interviews i ON i.candidate_id=c.id WHERE i.interview_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month',CURRENT_DATE)),0),
    'avgDaysToOffer', 0
  )
) AS data;

parameters.jsCode:
const loginHTML = `Sporton HR — 登入
🏢
Sporton HR
招募戰略面板 — 請登入
${$json.query?.key ? '密碼錯誤，請重試' : ''}
